channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eriksson Ek, Kaprizov return to lead the Wild past the Sharks, 8-7 in overtime
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Joel Eriksson Ek scored a career-high four goals in his return from a lower-body injury, Kirill Kaprizov had his second of the game in overtime in his first game back and the Minnesota Wild outlasted the San Jose Sharks 8-7 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jokic has 32nd triple-double to lead Nuggets past Kings 124-116 in Denver's 1st game without Malone
item.description: SACRAMENTO (AP) — Nikola Jokic had his 32nd triple-double of the season with 20 points, 12 rebounds and 11 assists and Denver beat the Sacramento Kings 124-116 on Wednesday night in the Nuggets' first game since head coach Michael Malone was fired.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL WAGAMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lionel Messi and Inter Miami pull off 3-goal rally to top LAFC and make CONCACAF Champions Cup semis
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Down 1-0 on the scoreboard, down 2-0 in total goals in the series and needing three goals to advance, Inter Miami needed a most unlikely rally. Lionel Messi made it happen.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Goals aplenty! A season-high 4 hat tricks in Wednesday's NHL action
item.description: There were plenty of goals scored in the NHL on Wednesday night and four players accounted for a bulk of them. Minnesota's Joel Eriksson Ek and San Jose's Macklin Celebrini traded hat tricks in one contest, and Toronto's Matthew Knies, Philadelphia's Tyson Foerster also had three-goal games.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: New year, same pain: White Sox have lost 7 straight and are 2-9 for 2nd straight season
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Chicago White Sox were hoping 2025 would be better after they lost 121 games last year, a major league record since 1900. Instead, their pain is continuing in new and unique ways. Chicago's 3-2 loss to Cleveland on Wednesday night was its seventh straight.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lonzo Ball meets family of meniscus donor who helped revive his NBA career
item.description: The Reinhardt family donated Alex's organs, which helped save the life of Chicago Bulls guard Lonzo Ball after he underwent cadaver meniscus transplant surgery.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Luka Doncic scores 45 points in Dallas return as Lakers clinch playoff spot with 112-97 win
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 45 points in his first game in Dallas since being traded to the Los Angeles, helping the Lakers wrap up a playoff spot with a 112-97 victory over the Mavericks on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Taylor and Serrano to headline again at Madison Square Garden. This time, all the fighters are women
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — When Katie Taylor and Amanda Serrano fought three years ago at Madison Square Garden, it did more than open a thrilling rivalry between two of boxing's best. It opened doors for women's boxers that neither could have imagined were ever available.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justice Department uncovers thousands of 'intimate' photos and videos during ex-Michigan coach hacking probe
item.description: The investigation into alleged hacking by a former Michigan assistant football coach has uncovered thousands of intimate and explicit photos and videos.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: The 1924 craftsman bungalow, located in St. Petersburg's Historic Old Northeast neighborhood, once belonged to Ruth, according to the real estate listing.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: San Jose Sharks’ Marc-Edouard Vlasic nominated for award
item.description: Bill Masterton Memorial Trophy recognizes NHL player who best exemplifies perseverance, sportsmanship and dedication to hockey
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Female athletes to be in the majority at 2028 Los Angeles Olympics after big win for women's soccer
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Female athletes will be in the majority at an Olympics for the first time at the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games thanks to a big win for women’s soccer.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fans impressed with new Bees Ballpark
item.description: SOUTH JORDAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Welcome to The Ballpark. The state of Utah has not had a brand new stadium since 2008 when Real Salt Lake opened Rio Tinto Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball: Canyon Hills 10, Southwest 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great Monday to play some baseball with Southwest hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers go on to win a score fest 10-7. The Rattlers scored six in the first and held on to win, despite Southwest cutting it down to 9-7 before tacking on one more run to win by three.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Loyola University Chicago sent preservation notice tied to federally indicted ex-Michigan coach
item.description: Loyola University Chicago has received a preservation notice from attorneys representing a former student-athlete, compelling the school to preserve evidence related to the indictment of former Michigan football assistant coach Matt Weiss on unauthorized computer access and identity theft charges.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Future uncertain for Duke basketball star due to new Trump policy
item.description: A new visa policy announced by the Trump administration last weekend could impact South Sudanese passport holders, including Duke basketball phenom Khaman Maluach.
item.dc:creator: Keaton Eberly, Fox 5

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Johnny Gaudreau's wife Meredith announces birth of couple's third child
item.description: Johnny and his brother were killed in New Jersey when they were riding bicycles and struck from behind by a suspected drunk driver.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke 70-67 in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Sorry guys, “Phi Slama Jama” is already taken. How ’bout something simple, like “Comeback Kids.” “National champs” might be a possibility, too.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Diego Luna's brace leads RSL past Galaxy, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Diego Luna scored two goals as Real Salt Lake cruised past the LA Galaxy Saturday afternoon at America First Field, 2-0. Luna scored the two goals in a five-minute span of the first half and Real Salt Lake (3-4-0, 9 points) controlled the rest of the contest.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Carmelo Anthony and Sue Bird highlight Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Fox 5

item.title: The Final Four again has multiple 5th-year starters. This time, it's a farewell to an uncommon era
item.description: “Credit to the NCAA for giving us a year back because that COVID year, that wasn’t real, honestly. Nah, it wasn’t fun at all.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Giants home opener game Friday celebrating 25th season at Oracle Park
item.description: The San Francisco Giants are starting their 25th Major League Baseball season at Oracle Park on Friday with their home opener game against the Seattle Mariners. At 1:35 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Doug Bruno 'feels great,' but says stepping aside is the right call as Jill Pizzotti takes over at DePaul
item.description: CHICAGO – Less than a week after Hall of Fame head coach Doug Bruno stepped down for health reasons, the DePaul women’s basketball program named his successor—and it’s a familiar name to fans.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: BYU guard Dallin Hall enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU point guard announced on Wednesday that he is entering the transfer portal after three seasons with the Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
